+
+
+
+ {item.participant.displayName + .split(" ") + .map((part) => part[0] ?? "") + .join("") + .slice(0, 2)} +
+
+

+

{item.participant.bio}

+
+
+

ai triage

{item.title}

+

{item.text}

+
+ {item.summary} +

{item.reasoning}

+
+
+
+ {item.source} + influence {item.influenceScore} + {item.needsReply ? "needs reply" : "resolved"} +
+ + Open + +
+
+ ); +}
